title: Complex Numbers: The Foundation of Quantum Computing
description: Master complex numbers - the essential mathematical language that makes quantum computing possible. Learn representations, operations, and their deep connection to quantum states.
learningObjectives: Explain why complex numbers are indispensable in quantum computing
Represent complex numbers in rectangular and polar forms
Perform arithmetic operations including addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division
Calculate the complex conjugate and modulus of any complex number
Connect complex number properties to quantum state amplitudes
